stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Consider two pulses that form part of a pulse string. Different parts of the pulse string are highlighted in red. The highlighted part of Pulse string 1 represents (1) _____, the red highlighted part of Pulse string 2 represents (2) _____, and the red highlighted line of Pulse string 3 represents (3) _____.

options.a: (1) the Pulse Recurrence Frequency (PRF); (2) the pulse length; (3) the Pulse Recurrence Interval (PRI)
options.b: (1) the pulse length; (2) the pulse power; (3) continuous power
options.c: (1) the pulse length; (2) the Pulse Recurrence Frequency (PRF); (3) the pulse power
options.d: (1) the Pulse Recurrence Interval (PRI); (2) continuous power; (3) the pulse length
